topics: Digital signals and coding, data conversion and quantization, sample and hold devices, mathematical modelling of the sampling process, design of maximum sampling frequency of digital systems in terms of the sensor delay
Data reconstruction and filtering of sampled signals: zero order hold and first order hold

Routh Hurwitz criteria, Jury's test, root loci of digital control systems
Rules for construction of root locus, frequency domain analysis
Bode plots, gain margin and phase margin
